enrichment.description: Re-fetch artwork, artist images, bios, release dates and genres for everything in your libraries. Useful after adding Last.fm / fanart.tv API keys. Runs in the background and is rate-limited, so a large library fills in gradually.
enrichment.refetching: {count, plural, one {Re-fetching # item in the background…} other {Re-fetching # items in the background…}}
enrichment.title: Metadata enrichment

metadata.artistSubtitle: {albumCount, plural, one {# album} other {# albums}} · {trackCount, plural, one {# track} other {# tracks}}
metadata.currentArtistHint: Currently {name}. Search to re-attribute to a different artist.
metadata.intro: Edit the shared catalog that everyone sees — rename an artist, album or track, replace its artwork, or re-attribute a release to a different artist. These changes are global and permanent (unlike per-library edits). Every change is recorded in the audit log.
metadata.noAlbumCovers: No covers found — the album needs a MusicBrainz match.
metadata.noArtistArtwork: No online artwork found — needs a fanart.tv key + a MusicBrainz match.
metadata.noLogos: No logos found — needs a fanart.tv key + a MusicBrainz match.

noAccess.body: You don't have access to site administration. {link}.
noAccess.title: Admin

users.deleteConfirm: Permanently delete @{handle} and ALL their data? This cannot be undone.
users.suspendConfirm: Suspend @{handle}? They'll be signed out and unable to log in.
users.title: Users
